meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Israel intensifies attacks on southern Lebanon, killing at least 16 people
items.summary: Southern Lebanon empties out under bombardment as Red Cross warns of worsening crisis.

items.title: The West Bank’s Youth Unemployment Crisis
items.summary: The West Bank's Youth Unemployment Crisis

items.title: Israel kills children in strikes on Gaza as fear taints Eid joy
items.summary: As Muslims around the world celebrate Eid, Palestinians in Gaza are facing fear, grief, and deadly attacks.

items.title: Ireland football coach urges players to ‘win this war’ against Israel
items.summary: Ireland are set to play Israel in home and away Nations League matches, but there has been pressure to boycott games.

items.title: Argentina’s ‘El Loco’ faces Uruguay mutiny ahead of World Cup
items.summary: Marcelo Bielsa's demanding coaching style faces internal threat in Uruguay camp ahead of World Cup as results slide.

items.title: Iran says it has a new air defence system. How significant is it?
items.summary: Iran’s claimed drone interception has renewed attention on Tehran’s military capabilities after months of bombardment.

items.title: At least 16 students killed in fire at Kenya girls school dorm
items.summary: Education minister says 16 killed, 79 injured at Utumishi Girls School in Gilgil, central Kenya.

items.title: Germany’s Voeller urges players to avoid political statements at World Cup
items.summary: German players urged not to repeat protests in 2026 following mouth covering in pre-match photos at Qatar World Cup.

items.title: Children with Down syndrome struggle with devastation of war in Gaza
items.summary: Children with Down syndrome struggle with devastation of war in Gaza

items.title: China’s secret weapon in AI race with US? Lots of cheap energy
items.summary: China's abundant supply of cheap electricity is a key advantage in the rollout of data centres needed to run AI models.

items.title: Israeli attack on Gaza City kills at least 10, including four children
items.summary: More than 20 others were injured in the attack, which came hours after the funeral of the head of Hamas’s armed wing.

items.title: Neymar injury threatens Brazil forward’s World Cup as scans needed on calf
items.summary: Brazil's record scorer, Neymar, has not played since 2023, but injury now appears to threaten his World Cup comeback.

items.title: Bafana Bafana World Cup squad: South Africa names two uncapped players
items.summary: South Africa's 26-man World Cup 2026 squad includes 19 local players, five who play in Europe, and two in the US.

items.title: World Cup delegation compliant with US Ebola protocols, DR Congo says
items.summary: 'The Leopards are ready, they are safe, and the ​US will embrace ⁠this team,' DRC's ambassador to the US says.

items.title: Australia charges alleged ISIL-linked woman after return from Syria
items.summary: Case follows repatriation of women and children held for years in Syrian camps without trial.

items.title: Iran and US trade attacks after Trump rejects report of Hormuz agreement
items.summary: IRGC says it targeted a base used by US forces after US attacks on site near Bandar Abbas.

items.title: What’s happening on Iran war day 90 as US launches new strikes
items.summary: The US strikes near Bandar Abbas as tensions rise in the Strait of Hormuz; Iran reports no casualties or damage.

items.title: Morocco tops Africa’s industrialisation index for first time
items.summary: North Africa leads Africa’s industrialisation, but continent-wide gains remain slow and uneven.

items.title: Palestinian graduates in the West Bank enter a collapsed job market
items.summary: Youth joblessness among West Bank graduates has nearly hit 40 percent. Many wonder what the degrees are worth.

items.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hailed as a once-in-a-lifetime talent after IPL blitz
items.summary: Cricket greats, writers and broadcasters hail 15-year-old Rajasthan Royals opener after his 29-ball 97 in IPL playoffs.

items.title: Ebola outbreak: What travel restrictions have countries imposed?
items.summary: Some countries ban arrivals from affected countries while others step up screening in bid to contain rare strain.

items.title: Ghana welcomes home citizens evacuated from South Africa
items.summary: The first flight carrying around 300 Ghanaians evacuated from South Africa following anti-immigrant tensions.

items.title: Google employee charged with insider trading over Polymarket bets
items.summary: Michele Spagnuolo allegedly used insider information to profit from bets on people on Google's most-searched list.

items.title: Aid cuts and climate change drive deadly malaria surge in Zimbabwe
items.summary: A surge in malaria cases in Zimbabwe is exposing fragile health systems and growing treatment shortages in rural areas.

items.title: Parisians defy swimming ban to cool off as record heat hits Europe
items.summary: Parisians cooled off in the city’s Saint-Martin canal as an unprecedented heatwave pushed temperatures across Europe.
